configurePresets.name: unix-host-release
configurePresets.description: This configuration sets the host Unix release build environment

configurePresets.name: unix-host-static-release
configurePresets.displayName: Enables static C++ libraries for Unix Release
configurePresets.description: This enables static C++ libraries for Unix Release

configurePresets.name: unix-host-shared-release
configurePresets.displayName: Enables shared C++ libraries for Unix Release
configurePresets.description: This enables shared C++ libraries for Unix Release

configurePresets.name: unix-host-tests-release
configurePresets.displayName: Enables unit tests for Unix Release
configurePresets.description: This enables unit tests for Unix Release

configurePresets.name: unix-host-cpp-examples-release
configurePresets.displayName: Enables C++ examples for Unix Release
configurePresets.description: This enables C++ examples for Unix Release

configurePresets.name: unix-host-python2-release
configurePresets.displayName: Enables Python2 bindings for Unix Release
configurePresets.description: This enables Python2 bindings for Unix Release

configurePresets.name: unix-host-python3-release
configurePresets.displayName: Enables Python3 bindings for Unix Release
configurePresets.description: This enables Python3 bindings for Unix Release

configurePresets.name: unix-host-static-all-release
configurePresets.displayName: Enables all project options with static C++ library configurations for Unix Release
configurePresets.description: This enables all project options with static C++ library configurations for Unix Release
